steps.action: Click Setujui on a PA1 Bank transaction
steps.observed: Modal displayed with transaction details and confirmation

steps.expected: Status advances to PA2, counts update
steps.observed: Toast success appeared. PA1 count decreased from 7 to 6, PA2 increased from 1 to 2. Total remained 8.

assertions.title: Reject Action Changes Status to Rejected

steps.action: Click Tolak on a PA1 transaction
steps.expected: Reject modal opens with reason field
steps.observed: Modal displayed with required 'Alasan Penolakan' textarea
Error message 'Alasan penolakan harus diisi' displayed

steps.action: Enter reason 'Data tidak valid' and confirm
steps.expected: Status changes to Rejected, item removed from pending
steps.observed: Transaction removed from pending list. PA1 count dropped from 6 to 5. Total dropped from 8 to 7.

assertions.issues: Minor UI issue: error message 'Alasan penolakan harus diisi' persists at top of page after successful rejection instead of being cleared.

steps.action: Login as approver1 (creator of some Kas transactions)
Examine action buttons on creator's own transactions
steps.observed: Transactions created by approver1 show ONLY 'Riwayat' button. Setujui and Tolak buttons are absent. Admin-created transactions show all three buttons.

steps.action: Create transactions via IPC in Kas, Bank, Gudang modules
steps.observed: All created transactions visible in dashboard with PA1 status

steps.action: Approve a Bank transaction from dashboard
steps.expected: Status updates in dashboard and module backend
steps.observed: Dashboard PA1/PA2 counts updated. getBankWithPagination confirmed status changed to 'Pending Approval 2'.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. Approval/reject flows and permission checks work correctly.
